prerequisites.value: Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, base attack bonus +6.

description.value:
**Benefit:** When you use a full-attack action to make multiple ranged weapon attacks against the same opponent, total the damage from all hits before applying that opponentâs damage reduction.

**Special:** If the massive damage optional rule is being used, that rule applies if the total damage you deal with this feat is equal to or exceeds half the opponentâs full normal hit points (minimum 50 points of damage).
